prompt:
Monochrome street poster illustration depicting a street scene, with Luffy as the central figure. Show the character in a dynamic battle pose, dressed in urban streetwear and equipped with themed props. Cover the body, limbs, and clothing densely with sticker-bomb tattoo motifs. Layer in typography so the piece reads like a streetwear poster crossed with an underground zine cover.

Style: strict black-and-white palette only, no grayscale gradients, no realistic shadows. Lines drawn in rough ink texture. Prioritize negative space, flat graphic shapes, and high-impact contrast. Framing: dynamic close-up. Aspect ratio 3:4.
